endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{instance}:lookupEffectiveGuestPolicy
endpoints.description: Lookup the effective guest policy that applies to a VM instance. This lookup merges all policies that are assigned to the instance ancestry.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{name}
endpoints.description: Get the patch job. This can be used to track the progress of an ongoing patch job or review the details of completed jobs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1beta/{name}
endpoints.description: Delete an OS Config patch deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1beta/{name}
endpoints.description: Update an OS Config patch deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Cancel a patch job. The patch job must be active. Canceled patch jobs cannot be restarted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{name}:pause
endpoints.description: Change state of patch deployment to "PAUSED". Patch deployment in paused state doesn't generate patch jobs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{name}:resume
endpoints.description: Change state of patch deployment back to "ACTIVE". Patch deployment in active state continues to generate patch jobs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{parent}/guestPolicies
endpoints.description: Get a page of OS Config guest policies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{parent}/guestPolicies
endpoints.description: Create an OS Config guest policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{parent}/instanceDetails
endpoints.description: Get a list of instance details for a given patch job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{parent}/patchDeployments
endpoints.description: Get a page of OS Config patch deployments.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{parent}/patchDeployments
endpoints.description: Create an OS Config patch deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{parent}/patchJobs
endpoints.description: Get a list of patch jobs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{parent}/patchJobs:execute
endpoints.description: Patch VM instances by creating and running a patch job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
